name: Entity Processing Workflow
description: Workflow to process an entity with initialization, token generation, external service call, and entity update modeled as a finite state machine.

transitions.name: initialize_entity
transitions.description: Initialize the entity and set cyoda_initialized flag.

externalized_processors.name: process_initialize
externalized_processors.description: Initialize the entity by calling init_cyoda and updating cyoda_initialized attribute.

transitions.name: generate_token
transitions.description: Generate and assign token to the entity.

externalized_processors.name: process_generate_token
externalized_processors.description: Generate and assign token to the entity.

transitions.name: external_service_call
transitions.description: Call external service to retrieve data and store response.

externalized_processors.name: process_call_external_service
externalized_processors.description: Call external service asynchronously and update the entity with the response.

transitions.name: update_entity_data
transitions.description: Update the entity data after processing previous steps.

externalized_processors.name: process_update_entity_data
externalized_processors.description: Finalize entity update by setting the processed flag.
